description_long: This is a digital multimeter, a handheld electronic measuring instrument commonly used for electrical diagnostics and troubleshooting. The device features a large, rectangular LCD display at the top, which shows numerical readings, and a rotary dial in the center for selecting measurement modes such as voltage, current, and resistance. Below the dial are two input jacks, color-coded red and black, for connecting the included test probes. The probes themselves are attached by flexible wires and have pointed metal tips for making contact with electrical circuits. The casing is primarily dark blue with red accents, and the back features some printed text and safety symbols. The overall design is ergonomic, with a slightly contoured body for easy handheld use.
description: A handheld digital multimeter with a large LCD display, rotary dial, and two color-coded test probes attached by wires. The casing is dark blue with red accents and ergonomic contours.
description_view_0: Front view showing the LCD display, rotary dial, and two input jacks with attached red and black test probes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the device and the alignment of the test probes along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying printed text, safety symbols, and the back of the casing with the probes visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thickness of the device and the side profile of the rotary dial and probe connectors.
